hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); proj=os.path.realpath('/home/tjenkins/Documents/losslessbob'); mem=os.path.realpath(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude')); block=bool(fp) and not os.path.realpath(fp).startswith(proj+os.sep) and not os.path.realpath(fp).startswith(mem+os.sep) and os.path.realpath(fp)!=proj; print(json.dumps({'continue':False,'stopReason':'Access denied: outside project directory'}) if block else '{}')" 2>/dev/null || true
